title: kohautia stellarioides
intro: Kohautia stellarioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating wounds. Kohautia stellarioides can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by boiling the leaves and stems in water, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions.
